title: Girlfriend of Steel Special Edition English Translation

wikitext:
[]: Girlfriend of Steel Special Edition English Translation             Quote Post by xPearse » Fri Dec 18, 2015 1:23 pm Not sure if any of you guys on here noticed I was doing this or saw the videos on the net but I just released the full thing a second ago and I thought that you guys might be interested. I'll leave the relevant links below. Also, just FYI, the Special Edition adds new scenes, a new ending, and the ability to customise the games running resolution up to 1080p so check it out if you're interested. Blog and Tumblr release posts http://pearsehillock.blogspot.co.uk/201 ... of_18.html http://xpearse.tumblr.com/post/13545349 ... d-of-steel New scenes and new ending videos https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=P ... rHrWAs1ljd https://youtu.be/TwYN23U4Qqw?list=PLhLJ ... b5bp2IQQ__

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel Special Edition English Translation             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Dec 18, 2015 3:18 pm Thanks. After 3.0 I need some wacky hijinks involving the characters.

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel Special Edition English Translation             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Dec 18, 2015 5:00 pm Thanks for all your work. I'll have to go through your backlog sometime when I have a chance; hope the stuff doesn't disappear in the meantime!

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel Special Edition English Translation             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Dec 18, 2015 7:33 pm Heh, I remember nabbing the PSP GoS SE for around $100 one year. (Long ago sold it due to moving.) Was great fun IMO! Asuka end is still my favorite after all this time
